steps.description: Click the "List all repairs without auth" button in the "vscuse_app_euQGplocal" Repair Service tab within the Microsoft Teams web interface.
Type "list all repairs without auth" into the message input box at the bottom of the "vscuse_app_euQGplocal" bot chat in Microsoft Teams web interface.
Press Enter in the message input box of the "vscuse_app_euQGplocal" bot within Microsoft Teams after typing "list all repairs without auth".
